text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk... Thunk...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the winter holidays, and I wake up one
morning to the sound of something hitting my
window. Opening the curtains, I find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Come on down! Look at all this
snow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A snowball clutched in one hand,
Matikanetannhauser waves to me with the other.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Everywhere you look, it's a winter
wonderland!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And just in time for the holidays! What could be
more magical than this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser is like an excited puppy.
Still, it's freezing. I start marching in place to
warm my body up, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whomp...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehe, gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I get hit by a snowball.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! You're all covered in snow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going to just stand here and get walloped.
I pack a snowball of my own and hurl it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yah! Good one! But, how do you like... this?! Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Hehehe, snowball fights are so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm surprised you've got such a childlike side to
you, Trainer. Hehehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Phew... What should we do next?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, I almost forgot! Come with me for a sec!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She leads me to a spot where a small, solitary
snowman stands.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I made it before I went to get you—a "snow
Trainer!"

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I wanted to show you this, but I totally forgot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Here, take a good look at its eyes! Don't they
look like yours?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just like she said, I kinda can see the
resemblance.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I'll have you know I put in the work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she worked really hard on it, so I want to
do something for her in return.
choice_data_list:
Then how about I make a snow Tannhauser to
go with it?

Then how about I make a snow Tannhauser to
go with it?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What?! A me snowman?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few hours later, and with some trial and error, I
manage to make a snowman that looks like
Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Thanks so much! It looks just like me! I
think!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's put them right next to each other!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, they're so cute! Wouldn't it be nice if they
never melted?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I end up spending an unforgettable day with
Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She leads me to a lone igloo.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I made it before I went to get you—I call it
Iglooey!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I wanted to show you this, but I totally forgot!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Do you want to go inside? It's warmer than you'd
think.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do as she says and enter the igloo. It's pretty
cramped, but also strangely cozy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Wouldn't it be nice if we could grill up
some mochi in here?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I've heard before that snow absorbs sound,
but it's pretty quiet in here, huh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's quiet, warm, and beautiful... And you're right
by my side...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser shuffles herself closer and
rests her head on my shoulder.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehe, this is so relaxing...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Can we stay like this for a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Yay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Snow begins to fall silently outside the igloo, and
we take in the beautiful, snowy landscape.
